text: I feel a quiet sense of curiosity in this modern, glass-walled space, watching others absorbed in their work or thoughts. The stark lighting and open design prompt reflections on transparency and the boundaries between solitude and collaboration. Stepping further into the vibrant R+D exhibit, I feel intellectually stimulated. The bold colors, interactive displays, and dense text invite me to contemplate the interplay between research, innovation, and human ingenuity. There is an atmosphere of purpose, yet also a gentle encouragement to ponder the deeper impact of our collective advancements. Here, I am both observer and participant in a narrative about how we shape—and are shaped by—knowledge.
